user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable setting up required documents at different recruitment stages, so that candidates submit the right documents at the right time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Required Candidate Documents screen; When I answer Yes to "Do you want to setup required documents from candidates at different stages of recruitment ?"; Then document configuration is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new required document, so that candidates are asked for the documents we need
acceptance_criteria: Given document setup is enabled; When I click Add new document and enter its name, type and required-at stage; Then the document is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit a required document, so that I can update document rules as needs change
acceptance_criteria: Given a required document is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated document is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view required documents with their type and required-at stage, so that I can review what is asked at each recruitment stage
acceptance_criteria: Given documents exist; When I open the list; Then each entry shows Document name, Document type, Employee class specific and Required at
